ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "primary_contact" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the supplier based on performance */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for deliveries */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Semiconductors - IC's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category it belongs to */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category (e.g., Switch, LIN Transceivers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the sub-category image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sub-category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sub-category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the product */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the product */,
  "mpn" TEXT /* Manufacturer Part Number */,
  "ipc_footprint_name" TEXT /* IPC footprint name describing the physical dimensions */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the product datasheet */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "order_code" TEXT /* Order code from supplier */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which reorder is triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "last_counted" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last physically counted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is quoted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the price was last updated */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the price */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for bulk orders */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the pricing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the pricing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, buyer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, buyer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the supplier (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the supplier */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for which feedback is given */,
  "delivery_time_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for delivery time */,
  "product_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for product quality */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for customer service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_feedback_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
